description: Unify blog.productsway.com fetch via lib/productswayBlog; GraphQL cursor + postsViaPage pagination; RSS/sitemap merge + RSC fallback; homepage 6 cap constant

description: Enrich missing article descriptions from blog HTML og:meta (9 sitemap-only posts)

description: Merge GraphQL with sitemap/RSS feed in parallel; raise page-enrich cap to cover all articles
